summary: Opt-in P8 compact-MoE WMMA path is wired in qwen35moe GGUF fast-bulk prefill. On the available gfx1100 RX 7900 XTX, Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M 512/0 reaches 534.406 tok/s (0.958 s wall prefill, 907.813 ms total prefill kernel time), meeting the <=1500 ms P8 acceptance target but not the <=700 ms stretch target. 512/128 graph-replay run reaches 529.598 prefill tok/s and 62.584 decode tok/s. rocprof 512/0 confirms Q4_K selected dual WMMA plus Q5_K/Q6_K selected down WMMA and Q8_0 WMMA are present; selected decode-shaped prefill_out kernels are gone from clean prefill, leaving only the documented Q6_K lm-head f32 pack8 logits dispatch.

hardware.gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 (available runner; W7900 not verified in this session)

software.hipcc_version:
HIP version: 7.13.60940-478a7a43c6
AMD clang version 23.0.0git (https://github.com/ROCm/llvm-project.git a3c1e65bfd98c7a76cafd24c34baf11f93e06be4+PATCHED:2506c552d8428e2cc1778bef048b20f818e06bb3)
Target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /home/lhl/miniforge3/envs/therock/lib/python3.12/site-packages/_rocm_sdk_devel/lib/llvm/bin

commands.correctness_kernel_bundle: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_wmma_routing.py tests/test_gguf_q4_k_selected_wmma_prefill.py tests/test_gguf_k_selected_wmma_prefill.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py -q
commands.bench_512_0: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 0 --warmup-decode-tokens 0 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p8_accept/wmma-512-0.json
commands.bench_512_128_graph: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p8_accept/wmma-512-128.json
commands.rocprof_512_0: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/p8_accept/rocprof-512-0 -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 0 --warmup-decode-tokens 0 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p8_accept/rocprof-512-0-bench.json
commands.rocprof_512_128_graph_timeout: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/p8_accept/rocprof-512-128 -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p8_accept/rocprof-512-128-bench.json
commands.rocprof_512_128_eager: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/p8_accept/rocprof-512-128-eager -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --no-graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p8_accept/rocprof-512-128-eager-bench.json

kernel_bundle.method: Selected compact Q4_K/Q5_K/Q6_K WMMA fixtures compare against kernels/cpu_reference GGUF quant GEMV oracles across uneven experts, padding, empty experts, and tile boundaries; qwen35 compact routing unit tests prove opt-in/fallback routing; gguf_linear dispatch opt-in tests pass.

optional_serial_vs_bulk_probe.note: The legacy bit-exact serial-vs-bulk probe fails when HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 because P8 WMMA changes batched reduction order/half operands from the token-serial row-GEMV path. The accepted correctness gate for P8 kernels is the CPU-reference fixture bundle plus finite deterministic E2E logits; keep this drift visible for future quality work.

rocprof.method: 512/0 is the clean prefill-only kernel trace. The 512/128 graph-replay profiler attempt timed out after 1800 s; a 512/128 eager-decode trace is retained only to show the same prefill WMMA symbols in a full 512/128 command without graph replay profiler pathology. Durations use End_Timestamp - Start_Timestamp.

rocprof.decode_shaped_prefill_out_prefill_path_n: In the clean 512/0 prefill trace, selected Q4_K/Q5_K/Q6_K decode-shaped *_prefill_out kernels disappear. One remaining gguf_k_pack8_prefill_out_kernel<unsigned short,float,6> dispatch (0.976 ms) is the tied Q6_K lm-head logits projection used for sampling the first token, not the MoE prefill path.

decision.reason: P8 compact-MoE WMMA opt-in meets the <=1500 ms total-prefill-kernel acceptance target, all P8 selected WMMA CPU-reference fixtures and routing tests pass, and 512/128 E2E logits are finite/deterministic across three graph-replay runs. Stretch <=700 ms is not met because GDN recurrent prefill remains ~667 ms of the clean 512/0 kernel trace.

notes: No resident weight sidecar/repack was used; raw GGUF expert bytes stay resident and selected compact WMMA kernels dequantize in-register.
This artifact reports the available local gfx1100 device as RX 7900 XTX. Treat W7900 performance as unverified until rerun on W7900.
The first one-off smoke after task #15 measured 210.927 tok/s, then repeated cached 3-run measurements stabilized at 534.406 tok/s median; retained numbers use the post-cache 3-run command above.
